title: dysoxylum juglans
intro: Dysoxylum juglans, also known as the Indian walnut, is a plant species that belongs to the family Meliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dysoxylum juglans include its ability to treat fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Dysoxylum juglans typically involve boiling the bark and roots to create a decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments.
